zh.Besford, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Besford於1350年出生在英國武斯特斯爾貝斯福德時，她的父親Alexander Besford31歲，母親Beatrice Thorndon28歲。她於1381年與Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福拉德波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年78歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Besford于1350年出生在英国武斯特斯爾貝斯福德时，她的父亲Alexander Besford31岁，母亲Beatrice Thorndon28岁。她于1381年与Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福拉德波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年78岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Besford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Besford (Worcs) or Besford in Shawbury (Shrops).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Besford was born in 1350, in Besford, Worcestershire, England, her father, Alexander Besford, was 31 and her mother, Beatrice Thorndon, was 28. She married Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol in 1381, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1428, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Besford est née en 1350, à Besford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Besford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Thorndon, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol en 1381, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1428, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Besford 1350 in Besford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Besford 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Thorndon 28. Sie hat 1381 in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1428 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Besford è nata il nel 1350 nel Besford, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Alexander Besford, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Thorndon, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol nel 1381, nel Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1428, nel Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Besfordが1350年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベスフォードで生まれた時，父Alexander Besfordは31歳，母Beatrice Thorndonは28歳であった。1381年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーでThomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーで78歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Besford(이)가 1350년 영국 워스스터실르 베스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Besford(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Thorndon(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Besford nasceu em 1350, em Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Besford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Thorndon, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol em 1381, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1428, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Besford родилась в 1350 г. в местности бесфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander Besford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Thorndon, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol в 1381 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1428 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Besford nació en 1350, en Besford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Besford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrice Thorndon, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol en 1381, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1428, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
